title: Heavy Duty Rolling Garment Rack 3 Tiers Adjustable Wire Shelving Clothes Rack with Rods and Side Hooks,Storage Closet Clothing Rack with Wheels Black 40 x 75 x 189.3 cm
features: Dimensions and Capacity: Measuring 40 x 75 x 189.3 cm (H x W x D), the garment rail has a weight capacity of 750 lb (340 kg) when stationary on its feet, reducing to approximately 300-350 lb (135-160 kg) when fitted with wheels

Sturdy And Long-lasting: Built to last with heavy-duty carbon steel and anti-corrosion powder-coated finish, this garment rail features 19.1 mm diameter frame tubing for outstanding stability and durability

Adjustable Height: Featuring height-adjustable shelving, this three-tiered garment rackl on casters combines a central hanging rail with dual side-mounted accessory hooks for versatile storage. The configurable tiers allow optimal arrangement of footwear, hanging garments, and folded clothing

Lockable 360° Wheels And Multifunctional: Featuring four heavy-duty lockable casters for effortless mobility throughout the home – including entries, utility rooms, hallways and bedrooms – this versatile garment rack secure positioning when required, with two braked wheels preventing accidental movement
Easy to Assemble: Follow the instructions, and use a rubber mallet (not included) for optimal results. If you have any questions, don't hesitate to reach out, and we'll be happy to assist you
description: Product Description Previous page Next page 1 Bedroom 2 Living Room 3 Laundry Room Removable wheels Adjustable Feet Adjustable Height Hook design
